title: The data platform bet: Why financial AI initiatives stall and how the winners scale
summary: Discover why 40% of financial AI initiatives fail, and learn how a unified data platform enables secure, real-time AI scaling in regulated environments.

event_model_payload.headline: The data platform bet: Why financial AI initiatives stall and how the winners scale
event_model_payload.summary: Discover why 40% of financial AI initiatives fail, and learn how a unified data platform enables secure, real-time AI scaling in regulated environments.

title: Stanford’s AI Index Report 2026 meets the security reality in financial services
summary: AI is becoming core to financial services. But as adoption scales, so does risk. Without secure, real-time data, strong governance, and cyber resilience, AI can amplify threats as quickly as it drives innovation.

event_model_payload.headline: Stanford’s AI Index Report 2026 meets the security reality in financial services
event_model_payload.summary: AI is becoming core to financial services. But as adoption scales, so does risk. Without secure, real-time data, strong governance, and cyber resilience, AI can amplify threats as quickly as it drives innovation.

title: Why the Elasticsearch Platform is the missing piece in your AI stack
summary: Most enterprise AI initiatives stitch together four to five systems for memory, search, and state. The Elasticsearch Platform handles all of it in one engine — and the architecture is simpler than you think.

event_model_payload.headline: Why the Elasticsearch Platform is the missing piece in your AI stack
event_model_payload.summary: Most enterprise AI initiatives stitch together four to five systems for memory, search, and state. The Elasticsearch Platform handles all of it in one engine — and the architecture is simpler than you think.

title: 1 year and 1 million messages later: Lessons learned building AI agents on the Elasticsearch Platform
summary: After a year and one million messages, Elastic's Field Technology team shares five lessons from building production AI agents: why logs matter most, how retrieval thresholds shape quality, and what high token counts actually signal.

event_model_payload.headline: 1 year and 1 million messages later: Lessons learned building AI agents on the Elasticsearch Platform
event_model_payload.summary: After a year and one million messages, Elastic's Field Technology team shares five lessons from building production AI agents: why logs matter most, how retrieval thresholds shape quality, and what high token counts actually signal.

title: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon
summary: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon showed AI agents built with Elastic tools to solve real-world problems. Winners include PHAROS (drug safety in <60s), Gauntlet (adversarial testing), and a duplicate detection agent for Kenya’s HIV program.

event_model_payload.headline: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon
event_model_payload.summary: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon showed AI agents built with Elastic tools to solve real-world problems. Winners include PHAROS (drug safety in <60s), Gauntlet (adversarial testing), and a duplicate detection agent for Kenya’s HIV program.

title: Gauntlet: What happens when your agent's tools fight back
summary: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon spotlighted Gauntlet, a top-three project that uses mocking agents to mutate tool calls, expose hidden failures, and improve AI agent reliability.

event_model_payload.headline: Gauntlet: What happens when your agent's tools fight back
event_model_payload.summary: The Elasticsearch Agent Builder Hackathon spotlighted Gauntlet, a top-three project that uses mocking agents to mutate tool calls, expose hidden failures, and improve AI agent reliability.

title: Catching invisible errors: How I built a duplicate detection agent for Kenya's HIV program
summary: A multi-agent duplicate detection system built with Elastic Agent Builder addresses the 56% failure rate of manual duplicate detection in Kenya's HIV patient records. It uses tiered risk scoring and specific recs to provide $195K annual savings.

event_model_payload.headline: Catching invisible errors: How I built a duplicate detection agent for Kenya's HIV program
event_model_payload.summary: A multi-agent duplicate detection system built with Elastic Agent Builder addresses the 56% failure rate of manual duplicate detection in Kenya's HIV patient records. It uses tiered risk scoring and specific recs to provide $195K annual savings.

title: PHAROS: 4 agents, 60 seconds, 1 missed drug safety signal away from disaster
summary: PHAROS is a 4-agent system built with Elasticsearch that automates pharmacovigilance. It detects adverse drug safety signals using WHO-standard analysis, generates regulatory reports, and sends critical alerts in under 60 seconds.

event_model_payload.headline: PHAROS: 4 agents, 60 seconds, 1 missed drug safety signal away from disaster
event_model_payload.summary: PHAROS is a 4-agent system built with Elasticsearch that automates pharmacovigilance. It detects adverse drug safety signals using WHO-standard analysis, generates regulatory reports, and sends critical alerts in under 60 seconds.

title: Elastic Stack 9.4.1 released
summary:
Version 9.4.1 of the Elastic Stack was released today. We recommend you upgrade to this latest version. We recommend 9.4.1 over the previous versions 9.4.0

For details of the issues that have been fixed and a full list of changes for each product in this version, please refer to the release notes.
